# Adrian Garcia — adriangg.dev

## Who I am

Adrian Garcia is a software engineer based in Spain. This site is a personal portfolio showcasing projects, skills, and contact information.

## Pages

- / — Home: introduction and highlights
- /projects — Projects: a curated list of personal and professional projects
- /about — About: bio, tech stack, and a downloadable CV
- /contact — Contact: form and links to reach out

## Tech stack

This site is built with Astro, Tailwind CSS 4, TypeScript, and deployed on Cloudflare Workers.

## Contact

- GitHub: https://github.com/adriangargg
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/adriangargg
- Site: https://adriangg.dev
